---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve MindMesh AI
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10.12]
- Streamlit Version: [e.g. 1.39.0]
- LLM Provider: [e.g. Gemini, Groq, Ollama]
- Qdrant: [e.g. Local docker, Qdrant Cloud]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., error logs from the terminal).
